title: Recover From Validation Errors In A Service Form
goal: Recover from missing required answers and stop on the check-answers page with the correct submitted values visible.
instruction: Complete the travel support prototype. If the form rejects missing required answers, correct them and continue until the check-answers page is visible.

success_assertions.value: Check your answers before sending your application

steps.explanation: The page rejected the empty full-name field, so I am checking the validation message before correcting it.
I entered the missing full name so the service can continue to the next question.
The full name is now filled in, so I am moving to the email-updates question.
I selected email updates, which reveals the email-address field required for this choice.
The page should now show a validation error because the email address is still missing.
I entered the required email address so the application can proceed.
The required answers are now present, so I am moving to the check-answers page.

postconditions.value: Check your answers before sending your application

action.summary: I recovered from the validation errors and reached the check-answers page with the entered name and email visible.

steps.explanation: The review page is visible and the corrected answers appear in the summary, so I am stopping here.
